question.label: Recognized work
question.name: What work do you think gets recognized here instead?
question.description: Drills into his recognition model to surface the specific gap between his current work and what he believes matters.

answer: I want clearer criteria, not reassurance.

assessment.note: Names a missing condition — clear criteria for recognized work — which is a strong negative growth signal; also reveals a clarity gap but clarity was off-signature.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I want clearer criteria, not reassurance.
